name: Me Today Limited
summary: Me Today Limited, through its subsidiaries, operates as a health and wellness company in New Zealand. The company offers range of supplement products from general health to immune function, energy, sleep, beauty, mobility, and relaxation. It also provides skincare products, such as micellar gel, cream cleanser, mist toner, moisturizer, serum, eye and night cream, facemask, lip balm, hand cream, hand wash, and hand lotion. In addition, it sells and markets third party brands, including life space, artemis, and sleep drop products. Me Today Limited is based in Auckland, New Zealand.
